title: Cross-Level Learning Pathway Bridge
description: Bridges 4 curriculum documents across 3 academic levels.

edges.rationale: General bridge: Grade 5 (K-12) → CS2013: Discrete Structures (Undergraduate).
General bridge: Grade 5 (K-12) → CS2013: Algorithms and Complexity (Undergraduate).
General bridge: CS2013: Discrete Structures (Undergraduate) → PhD in Mathematics (Doctoral).
General bridge: CS2013: Algorithms and Complexity (Undergraduate) → PhD in Mathematics (Doctoral).
